svg.text: 2. 4x CORNER M3 THROUGH-HOLES (3.4mm CLR) FOR MOUNTING TRAY TO OUTER SHELL LEDGES.
3. HEAT-SET INSERT BOSSES: 8mm OD, 6mm TOTAL HEIGHT (3mm ABOVE BASE), 4.0mm PILOT HOLE FOR M3 x 5mm BRASS INSERT.
4. PUMP MOUNTING HOLE PATTERN TBD -- MEASURE FROM PHYSICAL KPHM400 BRACKET OR OBTAIN STEP MODEL FROM GRABCAD.
5. 4x BPT C-CLIPS (NEAR FRONT EDGE): 8.3mm ID FOR 8.0mm OD BPT TUBE, 6.5mm SNAP-IN OPENING.
6. 4x 1/4" C-CLIPS (NEAR REAR EDGE): 6.65mm ID FOR 6.35mm OD HARD TUBE, 4.85mm SNAP-IN OPENING.
7. LOCATING TABS: 2mm PROTRUSION FROM EACH LONG EDGE, KEY INTO OUTER SHELL WALL SLOTS FOR LATERAL ALIGNMENT.
8. WIRE ROUTING CHANNEL: 5mm WIDE x 3mm DEEP U-CHANNEL ALONG REAR EDGE, FULL TRAY WIDTH.
9. PRINT ORIENTATION: FLAT (HORIZONTALLY) FOR MAXIMUM SCREW BOSS STRENGTH.
10. DASHED CIRCLES INDICATE APPROXIMATE BOSS POSITIONS PENDING PUMP BRACKET MEASUREMENT.
